label: masala_spices

ginger_ratio , cardmom_ratio = 2,1
print(f"Ratio is G: {ginger_ratio} and Ratio is C: {cardmom_ratio}")
ginger_ratio ,cardmom_ratio = cardmom_ratio, ginger_ratio
print(f"Ratio is G: {ginger_ratio} and Ratio is C: {cardmom_ratio}")
#Membership testing
